Defendant Executive Hotel Vintage Court, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Compelling Plaintiff To Sign Medical Record Authorizations; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE HOTEL VINTAGE COURT, LLC'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Compelling Plaintiff To Sign Medical Record Authorizations; Request For Sanctions.

The motion is untimely and not properly noticed pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1005.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Compelling Plaintiff To Sign Medical Record Authorizations; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Ryan Morales plaintiff in Pro Per Tel: 415.535.8402.
Delmar S. Thomas, Esq., of YUKEVICH | CAVANAUGH Tel:(213) 362-7777 for Defendant EXECUTIVE HOTEL VINTAGE COURT, LLC.

Hearing is held. Moving Party Defendant Executive Hotel Vintage, LLC. conetest portion of the tentative ruling that reads, "Defendant fails to provide the court with either the authorization he wants plaintiff to sign or the subpoena it issued to Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital, so the court has no way of knowing whether the proposed authorization or the subpoena seeks only discovery relevant documents".The matter argued and upon conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified:

Defendant Executive Hotel Hotel Vintage Court, LLC's motion to compel plaintiff Ryan Morales to sign medical record authorizations is denied without prejudice . Defendant fails to provide the court with either the authorization he wants plaintiff to sign or the subpoena it issued to Zuckerberg San Francisco General Hospital, so the court has no way of knowing whether the proposed authorization or the subpoena seeks only discovery relevant documents. Sanctions requests by both sides are is denied.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
